items.snippet: ShareAdd Us On GoogleAdd as a preferred source on GoogleBURLINGTON, Vt. (WCAX) - Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont has filed its 2027 premium rate request with state healthcare regulators.The insurer wants to increase rates for small groups 3.1%, and 5.2% for individuals.Related Stories:Final plans released for Vt. hospital transformationV ...
